candidates.why: Best match for direct property-level operating costs associated with rental revenue; analogous to cost of sales for a property company.

variables.notes: For this real estate company, 'Property costs' is the closest direct cost / cost of sales concept.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components from the income statement. Avoided 'Non-operating Income/(Expense), Net' because it mixes non-interest items such as derivatives and JV results.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution, not balance-sheet equity.
Generic equity label, but unpopulated and less specific than the parent-attributable equity row.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding minority interests, consistent with BE + MIB logic.
Usable only if no parent/owner-specific equity line exists; here the parent-attributable line exists and is preferred.
Shareholder count, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line to exclude any minority interest and avoid double counting with MIB.

Income statement attribution line; not preferred for balance-sheet minority interest.
